description:
Replace the current single-line plain format with a grouped, nested, glyph+word layout.

When no status filter: group by status (in progress, review, open, blocked, deferred), header per group, nest children under parents within each group.
When --status X: flat list, status column still present.

Line format:
  ● » in_progress   bl-5678 ★ Swap middleware                    api, auth

Nesting indent: 2 spaces per depth level, between status column and id. Children of an epic live beneath the epic line. Deps are not nesting (they're edges, not hierarchy) — parent is.

Width:
- Title truncated with ellipsis if total line would exceed $COLUMNS. Tags drop first, then title trims.
- Respect --plain and narrow terminals.

--json unchanged.
title: bl list redesign: status column, grouping, nesting under parents
